g.text: FP16 Tensor RF-duration sensitivity and control-power bias

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #667784

g.text: Operand-rate ATC is approximately (treatment power - operand-control power) / treatment throughput. A higher RF coefficient can therefore result from control-state power or throughput changes; it is not direct proof of higher Tensor silicon energy.
